eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mille Lacs, MN; at 11:18 AM on SEP 17, 2019 Effective until 1:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the required weekly test of the Emergency Alert System from the Mille Lacs County Sheriff's Office.   If this had been an actual Emergency, you would have been given further instructions.
